subcodes.first_line: Exalted art Thou, O Lord my God! I am the one who hath forsaken his all and set his face towards the splendors of the glory of Thy countenance
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انا الذی انقطعت عن کل شیء و توجهت الی بوارق انوار وجهک و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @love of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @spiritual transformation
